name: zed-mcp-server-redmine
description: Zed extension that bundles a Redmine stdio MCP server.

scripts.check: npm run lint:js && npm test && cargo check && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.lint:js: node --check server/index.js && node --check server/src/redmine.js && node --check server/src/tools.js && node --check test/redmine.test.js
